notes: Task 0001 (monorepo scaffold) verified PASS and merged as PR #4.
Scaffold includes pnpm+Turborepo workspace, Cloudflare Worker, 4 shared packages, tectonic/orun wiring, CI workflow.
All turbo tasks pass locally and in CI. Local kiox -- orun plan generates 15 jobs cleanly.
Task 0002 (@orun/types) verified PASS and merged as PR #5.
@orun/types exports all 23 types/interfaces from spec. paths.ts and package exports correct. 16 tests pass. All 5 packages typecheck/build/test clean.
kiox.yaml and kiox.lock are consistent at orun v1.11.0 on origin/main after PR #6.
workflow.yml uses kiox -- orun run --changed (not --gha). GHA mode is auto-detected by orun; CI confirmed 'gha' scope in output. Acceptable.
Task 0003 (coordinator) verified PASS and merged as PR #7.
RunCoordinator DO implements all 8 internal endpoints, alarm GC, heartbeat takeover, dependency gating. 35 tests pass.
CI run 25240025318: orun-coordinator detected, verify-turbo-package passed (build+typecheck) for all 3 envs. Tests not in CI (turbo-package component type limitation).
Coordinator contract gaps: ClaimResult missing depsBlocked/depsWaiting, UpdateJobRequest missing runnerId. Resolved with package-local CoordinatorClaimResult/CoordinatorUpdateJobRequest.
Risk: coordinator tsconfig emits stale test files to dist (pre-existing cosmetic issue, new builds clean per tsconfig exclusion added in Task 0004).
Risk: claims after run.status=failed allowed for independent jobs (undefined spec behavior, defensible design). Task 0006 may add fail-fast policy.
Task 0004 (@orun/storage) verified PASS and merged as PR #8.
R2Storage and D1Index implement all required methods. Migrations 0001/0002 match spec exactly. 42 tests pass (18 R2 + 24 D1).
CI run 25241213120: orun-storage detected, verify-turbo-package passed (build+typecheck) for all 3 envs. 2 components × 3 envs → 6 jobs.
Verifier fixed: deleteExpiredRuns SQL had cross-namespace over-delete bug (independent namespace_id IN + run_id IN subqueries). Fixed to correlated EXISTS subquery. New test added.
Storage risk: D1 tests use fake, not real D1. Fake correctly validates behavior but cannot catch D1-specific SQL dialect issues.
Task 0005 (auth module) verified PASS and merged as PR #12.

Worker auth module at apps/worker/src/auth/: OIDC verification (JWKS cache 15min, RS256, Web Crypto), session JWT (HS256), OAuth helpers (signed CSRF state, pagination, org-admin repos), deploy token, namespace upsert. 55 tests pass.

CI run 25243269728: orun-api-worker + orun-types detected (2 components × 3 envs → 6 jobs). verify-deploy-cloudflare-worker-turbo ran for orun-api-worker (build+typecheck+wrangler dry-run ×3 envs). No live deploy. Local kiox run: exec id orun-backend-20260502-0b11db, 6/6 jobs succeeded.
Auth CI limitation: verify-deploy-cloudflare-worker-turbo does not run unit tests. 55 auth tests pass locally only. Consistent with prior tasks.

Auth risk notes: fetchAllPages silently breaks on non-OK GitHub API (under-permission, not over-permission); unused OrunError import in namespace.ts (cosmetic); session iat not validated as number (no security impact). All non-blocking.
